---
title: "Week 13"
subtitle: "Environmental Advocacy in Rural New England"
description: "Apr 13 - Apr 16"
author: ""
date: ""
listing:
  - id: slides
    contents:
      - ../slides/week-13/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, date]
    date-format: "ddd, MMM DD"
    field-display-names:
      title: "Topic"
      date: "Date"
    sort: [filename]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
tbl-colwidths: [10,50,40]
---

# Speaker Bio
Julia Tilton reports on climate and energy for the Daily Yonder and is a multimedia producer for the Center for Rural Strategies. Julia previously worked on NASA’s Curious Universe podcast, and her reporting has been featured in a host of local, regional and national news outlets from Alaska to Mexico. Julia graduated from Vanderbilt with a degree in Earth & Environmental Sciences. She grew up in southern New Hampshire and is partial to the mountains and forests of the Northeast.


# Lectures

::: {#slides}
:::
